description: vLLM server argument definitions and metadata

model.description: Model name or path to serve

dtype.hint: Use bfloat16 for better numerical stability, float16 for memory savings

port.description: Port to serve the API on

host.description: Host address to bind the server

quantization.hint: Reduces memory usage but may impact quality

max_model_len.hint: Set None/empty to let vLLM auto-detect, or specify value (supports 1M, 100K format)

gpu_memory_utilization.description: Fraction of GPU memory to use
gpu_memory_utilization.hint: Lower values leave room for other processes
gpu_memory_utilization.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

max_num_seqs.description: Maximum number of sequences to process concurrently
max_num_seqs.hint: Higher values increase throughput but use more memory
max_num_seqs.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

max_num_batched_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens in a single batch
max_num_batched_tokens.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

swap_space.description: CPU swap space in GiB for handling overflow
swap_space.hint: Allows handling more requests at the cost of speed

cpu_offload_gb.description: Offload model weights to CPU (in GB)
cpu_offload_gb.hint: Reduces GPU memory usage but slows inference

tensor_parallel_size.description: Number of GPUs for tensor parallelism
tensor_parallel_size.hint: Split model across multiple GPUs for large models
tensor_parallel_size.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

pipeline_parallel_size.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

data_parallel_size.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

data_parallel_size_local.description: Number of data parallel replicas per node
data_parallel_size_local.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

data_parallel_address.description: Master node address for data parallelism
data_parallel_address.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

data_parallel_rpc_port.description: RPC port for data parallelism communication
data_parallel_rpc_port.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

data_parallel_start_rank.description: Starting rank for data parallel workers
data_parallel_start_rank.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

headless.description: Run as headless worker node (no API server)
headless.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

enable_expert_parallel.description: Enable expert parallelism for MoE models
enable_expert_parallel.hint: Only for Mixture of Experts models
enable_expert_parallel.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

language_model_only.description: Only load language model, skip vision encoder (for text-only workloads)
language_model_only.hint: Frees up memory for KV cache, use for text-only serving
language_model_only.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

mm_encoder_tp_mode.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

mm_processor_cache_type.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

mm_processor_kwargs.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

enable_chunked_prefill.description: Enable chunked prefill to reduce memory peaks
enable_chunked_prefill.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

enable_prefix_caching.hint: Speeds up requests with shared prefixes
enable_prefix_caching.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

kv_cache_dtype.description: Data type for KV cache storage. TurboQuant options enable 2-bit compression with 4x capacity.
kv_cache_dtype.hint: FP8 reduces memory with minimal quality impact. TurboQuant options (turboquant_*) enable 2-bit KV cache compression with 4x capacity (vLLM 0.20+)

block_size.description: Token block size for paged attention

enable_lora.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

lora_modules.description: LoRA modules to load (JSON format or name=path pairs)

max_cpu_loras.description: Maximum number of LoRA adapters that can be loaded on CPU

served_model_name.description: Model name to report in API responses
served_model_name.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

chat_template.description: Path to custom chat template file (.jinja)
chat_template.hint: Required for some models (e.g., Qwen3, Llama3.1) to enable proper tool calling. Example: examples/tool_chat_template_llama3.1_json.jinja

chat_template_content_format.description: Format of content in chat templates
chat_template_content_format.hint: Use 'openai' for models with tool/function calling support

trust_remote_code.description: Trust and execute remote code from model repo
trust_remote_code.hint: Required for some models but has security implications
trust_remote_code.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

disable_sliding_window.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

enforce_eager.hint: May help with debugging or compatibility

disable_log_stats.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

enable_log_requests.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

otlp_traces_endpoint.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

enable_prompt_tokens_details.description: Include token details in API responses

speculative_model.hint: Can speed up generation with a smaller draft model

reasoning_parser.hint: Streaming Parser Engine (v0.24.0+): Built-in reasoning parsers. No plugin file needed - parsers are integrated into vLLM core.

reasoning_parser_plugin.description: Path to custom reasoning parser plugin file (e.g., nano_v3_reasoning_parser.py)
reasoning_parser_plugin.hint: Use with --reasoning-parser to specify custom parser
reasoning_parser_plugin.deprecation_note: Streaming Parser Engine (v0.24.0+) uses built-in parsers. Plugin files are no longer needed.

distributed_executor_backend.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

disable_custom_all_reduce.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

max_parallel_loading_workers.description: Load model in parallel batches to avoid RAM OOM
max_parallel_loading_workers.hint: Useful for large models with tensor parallelism
max_parallel_loading_workers.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

cpu_offload_space.description: CPU offload space in GiB (newer than cpu-offload-gb)
cpu_offload_space.hint: Virtual GPU memory extension using CPU RAM

enable_sleep_mode.description: Enable sleep mode for CUDA power saving
enable_sleep_mode.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

calculate_kv_scales.description: Calculate k_scale and v_scale for FP8 KV cache
calculate_kv_scales.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

long_prefill_token_threshold.description: Token threshold for long prefill requests
long_prefill_token_threshold.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

max_num_partial_prefills.description: Max concurrent partial prefills for chunked prefill
max_num_partial_prefills.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

generation_config.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

generation_config_override.description: JSON string to override generation config

disable_frontend_multiprocessing.description: Run frontend in same process as engine (vLLM 0.20+)

tool_call_parser.description: Tool call parser for function calling support
tool_call_parser.hint: Streaming Parser Engine (v0.24.0+): Unified tool-call parsing. Parsers: openai, hermes, mistral, internlm, llama3_json, granite, jamba, deepseek_v3, deepseek_v31, glm45, hunyuan_a13b, kimi_k2, qwen3, minimax_m2, glm47/51/52, nemotron_v3

tool_parser_plugin.description: Path to custom tool parser plugin file
tool_parser_plugin.hint: Use with --tool-call-parser to specify custom parser
tool_parser_plugin.deprecation_note: Streaming Parser Engine (v0.24.0+) uses built-in parsers. Plugin files are no longer needed.

log_config_file.description: Path to logging config JSON file

async_scheduling.description: EXPERIMENTAL: Perform async scheduling to reduce CPU overhead
async_scheduling.hint: May help reduce CPU overheads but not supported with all features
async_scheduling.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

speculative_config.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

attention_backend.hint: Auto-selects the best backend. FlashAttention 4 is default for MLA prefill on Hopper+
attention_backend.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

tq_max_kv_splits_for_cuda_graph.description: TurboQuant max KV splits for CUDA graph decode (vLLM 0.20+)
tq_max_kv_splits_for_cuda_graph.hint: Fixes split count for constant grid dimensions across captures. Used with TurboQuant KV cache.

kv_cache_memory_bytes.description: KV cache memory size per GPU in bytes (vLLM 0.20+)
kv_cache_memory_bytes.hint: Fine-grain control of KV cache memory. Overrides gpu_memory_utilization when set.
kv_cache_memory_bytes.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

kv_offloading_size.description: KV cache offloading buffer size in GiB (vLLM 0.20+)
kv_offloading_size.hint: Enables KV cache offloading to CPU. Total buffer summed across all TP ranks when TP > 1.
kv_offloading_size.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

kv_offloading_backend.hint: Only active when kv_offloading_size is set. 'native' uses vLLM CPU offloading, 'lmcache' uses LMCache.
kv_offloading_backend.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

kv_cache_dtype_skip_layers.description: Layer patterns to skip KV cache quantization (vLLM 0.20+)
kv_cache_dtype_skip_layers.hint: Accepts layer indices (e.g., '0,2,4') or attention type names (e.g., 'sliding_window'). Auto-skips first/last 2 layers for TurboQuant.
kv_cache_dtype_skip_layers.deprecation_note: Removed from CLI in vLLM 0.22.0. Parameter still available as EngineArgs field and can be set via environment variables or configuration files.

prefix_caching_hash_algo.hint: sha256 is most secure. xxhash variants are faster but non-cryptographic. Requires xxhash package for xxhash options.
prefix_caching_hash_algo.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

enable_ep_weight_filter.description: Enable expert weight filter for expert parallelism (vLLM 0.20+)
enable_ep_weight_filter.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

all2all_backend.hint: DeepEP backends require the DeepEP package installed
all2all_backend.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

enable_elastic_ep.hint: Allows dynamic adjustment of expert parallelism
enable_elastic_ep.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

expert_placement_strategy.description: Strategy for placing experts across devices (vLLM 0.20+)
expert_placement_strategy.hint: Controls how MoE experts are distributed across GPUs
expert_placement_strategy.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

enable_eplb.hint: For MoE models with expert parallelism

eplb_config.hint: JSON config for expert parallel load balancing

decode_context_parallel_size.hint: Split decode across multiple GPUs for better throughput
decode_context_parallel_size.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

prefill_context_parallel_size.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

dcp_comm_backend.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

numa_bind.description: Enable NUMA binding for GPU workers (vLLM 0.20+)

optimization_level.hint: Higher levels enable more aggressive optimizations
optimization_level.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

performance_mode.hint: latency optimizes for low latency, throughput for high throughput

enable_return_routed_experts.hint: Useful for debugging MoE routing decisions
enable_return_routed_experts.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

model_impl.hint: Use 'vllm' for native vLLM implementation, 'transformers' for HF transformers

logprobs_mode.hint: 'fast' mode may be less accurate but faster

disable_cascade_attn.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

skip_tokenizer_init.hint: Useful for embedding-only models that don't need tokenization
skip_tokenizer_init.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

enable_prompt_embeds.hint: Allows passing pre-computed embeddings instead of text prompts
enable_prompt_embeds.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

override_attention_dtype.hint: Force a specific dtype for attention computation
override_attention_dtype.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

cudagraph_capture_sizes.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

max_cudagraph_capture_size.deprecation_note: Removed from CLI in vLLM 0.22.0. Parameter still available as EngineArgs field and can be set via environment variables or configuration files.

moe_backend.hint: Controls which backend is used for MoE fused kernel

ir_op_priority.hint: JSON config for vLLM IR operator priorities

enable_flashinfer_autotune.hint: Auto-tunes FlashInfer kernel parameters for best performance
enable_flashinfer_autotune.deprecation_note: Removed from CLI in vLLM 0.22.0. Parameter still available as EngineArgs field and can be set via environment variables or configuration files.

kv_transfer_config.hint: JSON config for KV cache transfer in disaggregated serving
kv_transfer_config.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

kv_events_config.hint: JSON config for GPU-side KV events in HMA

ec_transfer_config.hint: JSON config for expert chunk transfer
ec_transfer_config.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

reasoning_config.hint: JSON config for reasoning model settings

structured_outputs_config.hint: JSON config for structured output settings
structured_outputs_config.deprecation_note: Removed from CLI in vLLM 0.22.0. Parameter still available as EngineArgs field and can be set via environment variables or configuration files.

attention_config.hint: JSON config for attention backend settings

weight_transfer_config.hint: JSON config for weight transfer settings
weight_transfer_config.deprecation_note: Removed from CLI in vLLM 0.22.0. Parameter still available as EngineArgs field and can be set via environment variables or configuration files.

additional_config.hint: JSON config for additional vLLM settings

mamba_backend.hint: Backend for Mamba state space models

enable_mamba_cache_stochastic_rounding.description: Enable stochastic rounding for Mamba cache (vLLM 0.20+)
enable_mamba_cache_stochastic_rounding.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

mamba_block_size.hint: Must be a multiple of 8. Only set when prefix caching is enabled.

mamba_cache_mode.hint: 'align' recommended for speculative decoding with Mamba models
mamba_cache_mode.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

mamba_cache_dtype.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

mamba_ssm_cache_dtype.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

offload_backend.hint: Controls how model weights are offloaded to CPU
offload_backend.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

cpu_offload_params.hint: Comma-separated list of parameter names to offload

offload_group_size.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

offload_num_in_group.description: Number of layers in each offload group (vLLM 0.20+)
offload_num_in_group.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

offload_prefetch_step.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

kv_cache_metrics.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

kv_cache_metrics_sample.deprecation_note: Removed from CLI in vLLM 0.22.0. Parameter still available as EngineArgs field and can be set via environment variables or configuration files.

cudagraph_metrics.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

enable_layerwise_nvtx_tracing.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

enable_mfu_metrics.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

enable_logging_iteration_details.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

enable_mm_processor_stats.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

scheduling_policy.hint: fcfs = first-come-first-served, utilization = optimize GPU utilization
scheduling_policy.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

max_long_partial_prefills.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

scheduler_reserve_full_isl.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

disable_hybrid_kv_cache_manager.hint: Set to false (--no-disable-hybrid-kv-cache-manager) to let vLLM decide. Required with KV connectors.
disable_hybrid_kv_cache_manager.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

stream_interval.hint: Number of tokens between streaming updates
stream_interval.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

disable_chunked_mm_input.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

scheduler_cls.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

allowed_local_media_path.description: Allowed local media path for multimodal inputs (vLLM 0.20+)
allowed_local_media_path.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

allowed_media_domains.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

logits_processors.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

io_processor_plugin.deprecation_note: Argument no longer in vLLM source

code_revision.description: Revision of the code (model implementation) to use from the model repo

data_parallel_supervisor_port.description: Port for data parallel supervisor communication

default_chat_template_kwargs.description: Default kwargs for chat template rendering

default_mm_loras.description: Default multimodal LoRA modules to load

disable_access_log_for_endpoints.description: Disable access logging for specific endpoints (comma-separated)

download_dir.description: Directory to download and cache models

dp_supervisor_probe_failure_threshold.description: Number of probe failures before considering DP worker unhealthy

dp_supervisor_probe_interval_s.description: Interval in seconds between DP supervisor probes

dp_supervisor_probe_timeout_s.description: Timeout in seconds for DP supervisor probe responses

enable_flash_late_interaction.description: Enable FlashAttention late interaction for improved performance

enable_force_include_usage.description: Force include usage statistics in responses

enable_log_deltas.description: Enable logging of response deltas for streaming

enable_request_id_headers.description: Include request ID in response headers

exclude_tools_when_tool_choice_none.description: Exclude tools from the prompt when tool_choice is none

fingerprint_value.description: Custom fingerprint value for request tracking

h11_max_header_count.description: Maximum number of HTTP headers allowed (h11 protocol)

h11_max_incomplete_event_size.description: Maximum size of incomplete HTTP events (h11 protocol)

hf_token.description: Hugging Face authentication token for private models

ignore_patterns.description: Patterns to ignore when loading model files

log_error_stack.description: Include stack traces in error responses

master_addr.description: Master node address for distributed training

master_port.description: Master node port for distributed training

middleware.description: ASGI middleware to apply to the server

model_loader_extra_config.description: Extra configuration for model loading (JSON string)

nnodes.description: Number of nodes in the cluster

node_rank.description: Rank of this node in the cluster

return_tokens_as_token_ids.description: Return tokens as token IDs instead of decoded strings

root_path.description: Root path prefix for all API endpoints

runner.description: Runner mode: llm, worker, or scraper

ssl_ca_certs.description: Path to SSL CA certificates file

ssl_ciphers.description: SSL ciphers to use (OpenSSL cipher string)

tokens_only.description: Return only tokens without additional metadata

tool_server.description: URL of the tool server for function calling

trust_request_chat_template.description: Trust chat template provided in client requests

uds.description: Unix domain socket path for server communication

use_tqdm_on_load.description: Show tqdm progress bar during model loading

worker_cls.description: Custom worker class for distributed execution

limit_per_prompt.description: Synced from vLLM GitHub: New argument in vLLM source

media_io_kwargs.description: Synced from vLLM GitHub: New argument in vLLM source

override_generation_config.description: Synced from vLLM GitHub: New argument in vLLM source

device_ids.description: Device IDs to use (replaces CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES). List of GPU indices or device strings.
device_ids.hint: Managed by GPU Selection. vLLM v0.24.0+ uses --device-ids instead of CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES.

device.description: Deprecated: use device_ids instead. Comma-separated GPU indices.

data_parallel_backend.description: Data parallel backend for distributed serving.

data_parallel_external_lb.description: Enable external load balancer for data parallel.

data_parallel_hybrid_lb.description: Enable hybrid load balancing for data parallel.

data_parallel_multi_port_external_lb.description: Enable multi-port external load balancer for data parallel.

data_parallel_rank.description: Data parallel rank for this process.

disable_nccl_for_dp_synchronization.description: Disable NCCL for data parallel synchronization.

dbo_decode_token_threshold.description: Token threshold for DBO decode phase.

dbo_prefill_token_threshold.description: Token threshold for DBO prefill phase.

cpu_distributed_timeout_seconds.description: CPU distributed communication timeout in seconds.

mm_encoder_attn_dtype.description: Attention data type for multimodal encoder.

mm_encoder_fp8_scale_path.description: Path to FP8 scale for multimodal encoder.

mm_encoder_fp8_scale_save_path.description: Path to save FP8 scale for multimodal encoder.

mm_encoder_fp8_scale_save_margin.description: FP8 scale save margin for multimodal encoder.

mm_processor_cache_gb.description: Multimodal processor cache size in GB.

mm_shm_cache_max_object_size_mb.description: Max shared memory cache object size in MB.

video_pruning_rate.description: Video pruning rate for multimodal inputs.

kv_sharing_fast_prefill.description: Enable fast prefill for KV sharing.

collect_detailed_traces.description: Collect detailed traces for specified modules.

diffusion_config.hint: Required for DiffusionGemma and other diffusion LLMs.

show_hidden_metrics_for_version.description: Show hidden metrics for specified version.

watermark.description: Watermark value for KV cache scheduling.

default_max_num_seqs.description: Default max number of sequences by usage context.

default_max_num_batched_tokens.description: Default max batched tokens by usage context.
